title: pleopeltis forbesii
intro: Pleopeltis forbesii, also known as the Forbes' polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis forbesii include the potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
